name: production-theorem
description: Production-grade theorem workflow for brainstorming, planning, execution, TDD, review, and execution reporting.

interface.longDescription: Controlled production workflow that turns ambiguity into grounded decisions, plans into auditable checklists, and execution into validated reports with explicit reconciliation and learning.
defaultPrompt: Use theorize to interrogate a vague implementation idea before we plan it.
Use planning-theorem to create a production-grade plan with checklist IDs and validation.
Use execute to carry an approved plan through implementation, testing, simplification, and reporting.
If the work touches THG or the Database Harness, consult the thg-harness-awareness agent first.
